claims.description: Conditional Access claims-challenge JSON, lifted verbatim from a previous tool's step-up error. When provided, AAD prompts the user to satisfy the required authentication context (MFA, compliant device, etc.) and the new access token carries the matching `acrs` claim. After login succeeds, re-invoke the original tool.

loginHint.description: Pre-fills AAD's username field, skipping the account picker. Defaults to the currently signed-in user when `claims` is provided. Only set this if a different account should satisfy the step-up.
